"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Hazel.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Hazel.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Hazel.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\X86_64~2.EXE -m64 -g -shared -o ..\libs\libHazel.dll -Wl,--out-implib,..\libs\libHazel.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Hazel.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\Hazel.dir\linkLibs.rsp
